title: Patient Assessment
description: Clinical assessment techniques for evaluating respiratory patients.

lessons.title: Patient History & Laboratory Values
lessons.description: Patient history, chart review, and laboratory values — CBC, BMP, microbiology, and coagulation testing.

lessons.title: Patient Inspection
lessons.description: Communication, privacy zones, cardiopulmonary signs & symptoms (OLDCART, cough, sputum, dyspnea, chest pain, edema), pain scales, LOC, and the Glasgow Coma Scale.

lessons.title: Vital Signs, Physical Examination & Palpation
lessons.description: General clinical presentation (color), vital signs, breathing rates & patterns, head-to-toe physical exam, and palpation of the chest, pulse sites, trachea, and blood pressure.

lessons.title: Percussion, Auscultation & Pulse Oximetry
lessons.description: Chest percussion technique and sounds; lung, voice, and heart auscultation; adventitious breath sounds; and pulse oximetry principles, indications, and procedure.

resources.title: JKO Portal Quick Link
resources.description: Sign in to the JKO portal to access Patient Assessment coursework.

audio.title: Clinical Signs in Respiratory Patient Inspection
Identifying Critical Respiratory and Vital Signs
